requirements.title: Application summary
requirements.description: The application summary sheet that states who is applying and how many people will live in the home.

requirements.title: Two recent pay stubs
requirements.description: Your two most recent pay stubs, dated within the last 60 days, so the office can see your current pay.

requirements.title: Employment letter
requirements.description: If you have wage income, a letter from your employer confirming your job and pay, dated within the last 60 days.

requirements.title: Benefit award letter
requirements.description: If you receive benefit payments, the letter that states your benefit amount, dated within the last 60 days.

requirements.title: Proof of gig income
requirements.description: If you have gig or app-based income, a second document that confirms it — for example a bank statement showing the deposits.

requirements.title: Household size
requirements.description: You confirm how many people will live in the home. This picks the right row in the income limit table.
